title: Launch timeline slip
mitigation: Daily standups to track blockers. Identify items that can be deferred to v1.1.

title: API performance under load
mitigation: Conduct load testing before launch. Optimize database queries. Implement caching layer.

title: Third-party auth provider reliability
mitigation: Implement fallback authentication method. Monitor provider status page. Set up alerting.

title: Scope creep from beta feedback
mitigation: Established strict v1 feature boundary. Beta feedback categorized into v1 must-have vs v1.1 nice-to-have.

title: Single point of failure on DevOps knowledge
mitigation: Tom to document all infrastructure procedures. Cross-train Maria on deployment process.
